hero.headline: Don't forget. Use Reminders
hero.subheadline: Track life's to-dos, from grocery lists to work projects. With iCloud, your tasks stay in sync across all your devices.

pricing.title: Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you.

tiers.name: Personal
tiers.description: Perfect for keeping track of your daily life.

items.title: Smart Organization
items.description: Smart Lists automatically group your to-dos. Use Apple Intelligence to auto-categorize lists into sections and column views.

items.title: Powerful Intelligence
items.description: Natural language support lets you type phrases like 'Jog every other morning' to create recurring reminders instantly.

items.title: Contextual Triggers
items.description: Set reminders for specific locations like 'when I arrive at home' or even 'the next time I chat with someone' in Messages.

items.title: Seamless Collaboration
items.description: Share lists and assign tasks to others. Everyone with access can add, edit, or complete reminders in real-time.

gallery.title: Experience it yourself
gallery.subtitle: Be reminded when and how you want

steps.label: Smart Lists
steps.description: Quickly add tasks and reminders to your lists.

steps.label: Stay Notified
steps.description: Set reminders and stay on track.

steps.label: Collaborate
steps.description: Share and collaborate on a list with others.

waitlist.title: Be first in line
waitlist.subtitle: Join millions of users staying organized with Reminders.
waitlist.successMessage: You're on the list! Check your email soon.

items.question: Does it sync across all my devices?
items.answer: Yes, with iCloud, all your reminders stay in sync across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Apple Vision Pro automatically.

items.question: Can I use Siri to create reminders?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can use Siri to create reminders with your voice, or use natural language typing within the app.

items.question: Can I collaborate with others?
items.answer: Yes, you can share lists with others and assign specific reminders to people you're collaborating with.

footer.tagline: The easiest way to stay organized.
